title: Gen3C Generation Pipeline

steps: Accept inference params: inference_type, checkpoint_dir, checkpoint_name, guidance, num_steps, height, width, fps, num_video_frames, seed
Accept offload flags: offload_network, offload_tokenizer, offload_text_encoder_model, offload_prompt_upsampler, offload_guardrail_models
Accept feature flags: enable_prompt_upsampler, has_text_input, disable_guardrail, disable_prompt_encoder
Call super().__init__ with all params + num_input_frames=1
NOTE: Overrides parent which loads DiffusionT2WModel

activities.signature: generate(prompt, image_path, rendered_warp_images: Tensor, rendered_warp_masks: Tensor, negative_prompt=None, return_latents=False) -> (video, prompt) | (video, prompt, latents) | None
steps: Build prompts list: [prompt] or [prompt, negative_prompt] if negative_prompt provided
Extract negative_prompt_embedding = prompt_embeddings[1] if negative_prompt else None
_run_model_with_offload(prompt_embedding, negative_prompt_embedding, image_path, rendered_warp_images, rendered_warp_masks, return_latents) → gen_dict

activities.signature: _run_model_with_offload(prompt_embedding, image_or_video_path, rendered_warp_images, rendered_warp_masks, negative_prompt_embedding=None, return_latents=False) -> dict
steps: YES → save latents = sample (raw latent tensor before decoding)
get_video_batch(model=self.model, prompt_embedding=embedding, negative_prompt_embedding, height, width, fps, num_video_frames) → data_batch, state_shape

generate_world_from_video(model=self.model, state_shape=model.state_shape, is_negative_prompt=True, data_batch=data_batch, guidance=self.guidance, num_steps=self.num_steps, seed=self.seed, condition_latent=condition_latent, num_input_frames=self.num_input_frames) → video

key_relationships: Gen3cPipeline overrides _load_model to use DiffusionGen3CModel (vs parent DiffusionT2WModel)
Gen3cPipeline overrides generate() with 3D warp conditioning inputs
Gen3cPipeline overrides _run_model_with_offload() with warp tensor pass-through
Gen3cPipeline overrides _run_model() to inject condition_state and condition_state_mask into data_batch
generate() calls _run_model_with_offload() which orchestrates tokenizer/network offload

offload_patterns.offload_tokenizer: If True: _load_tokenizer() before encoding, _offload_tokenizer() after decoding
offload_patterns.offload_prompt_upsampler: If True: prompt upsampler not preloaded in __init__; loaded on demand
offload_patterns.offload_guardrail_models: Guardrail models loaded/unloaded per call via _run_guardrail_on_*_with_offload()

gen3c_specific_inputs.rendered_warp_images: torch.Tensor — pre-rendered 3D warped image frames for conditioning
gen3c_specific_inputs.rendered_warp_masks: torch.Tensor — masks indicating valid warp regions
gen3c_specific_inputs.image_path: str — path to reference image for tokenizer conditioning
gen3c_specific_inputs.return_latents: bool — if True, also returns raw latent tensor before decoding

important_notes: Gen3C adds 3D-consistent generation via rendered_warp_images/masks injected into data_batch as condition_state/condition_state_mask. Uses DiffusionGen3CModel instead of standard DiffusionT2WModel. num_input_frames=1 hardcoded. All offload flags control GPU memory by loading/unloading model components around inference calls.
